content:
2026 February contribution list is here!
We sincerely thank the below <@&1301589804135223316>  for their help!

KR:
●BlackCatNero ー　
Translated WoD and Relic effects
Proofread multiple human-translated content(Faded Legacy Chapter 1~3, side stories, UI, effects, etc.)

●LavenderJuly ー
Translated & Proofread Traphase lines
Translated FeatureUnlock
Translated Aurita's Psyche Deepdive, Culinary Dominion

JP:
● Alza — Translation & Proofreading (various lines in Astral Reign Ch.1, Special Ops_Salvador, Special Ops_24, Dreamscape_Miryam, Special Ops_Horla, Dreamscape_Castor, Dreamscape_Pollux, Psyche Deepdive_Corposant, Skills, Items, Relics, Events, Stages, Resonance, Awakener, Activity, Gacha, Voice lines, Gameplay UI, etc.)


These volunteer translation updates are scheduled to go live **on 03/20/2026!**
Additionally, 

Starting from March 2026,

We will include the volunteer contribution in the in-game update notes!
You can directly find them, including info on who translated/proofread what, in our game client, along with other update info.

We will still continue to update the contribution list monthly in this server & in the Morimens main server. 

Thank you for your help as always!
